title: I Believe I Can Fly
why_this_song: I Believe I Can Fly by R. Kelly (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 22 times; first heard in: "If I just believe it, there's nothing to it"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Spread my wings and fly away"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Spread my wings and fly away"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I used to think that I could not go on"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And life was nothing but an awful song"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I believe I can touch the sky
I think about it every night and day
Spread my wings and fly away
See I was on the verge of breaking down
Sometimes silence can seem so loud
There are miracles in life I must achieve

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "believe" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "believe" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "spread" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "spread" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And life was nothing but an awful song
There are miracles in life I must achieve
I believe I can touch the sky

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm leaning on the everlasting arms
I see me running through that open door

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "I Believe I Can Fly" was released in 1996. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "I Believe I Can Fly" foi lançada em 1996. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "I Believe I Can Fly" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "I Believe I Can Fly" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
